flavor: “'Yap' is a technical term, I assure you.”
name: Hank Mccoy
text: Setup: Put Beast's Lab into play, your chosen side faceup. Science! — You may include events with a printed [mental] resource icon from any aspect in your deck.

flavor: "A feat with my feet leads to your defeat!"
name: Beast
text: Super Genius — Beast gets +1 THW for each card tucked under Beast's Lab. [star] Forced Response: After Beast makes a basic thwart, discard each card tucked under Beast's Lab.

name: Beast's Lab
text: Permanent. Max 3 cards tucked here. Beast gains the [[X-Men]] trait. Response: After you play an event with a printed [mental] resource, tuck that event from your discard pile under this card. Then, heal 1 damage from your identity.

name: Beast's Lab
text: Permanent. Max 3 cards tucked here. Beast gains the [[Avenger]] trait. Response: After you play an event with a printed [mental] resource, tuck that event from your discard pile under this card. Then, heal 1 damage from your identity.

flavor: "Alas, it sometimes occurs to me that super-heroing is not the most tranquil of avocations!"
name: "oh My..."
text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 1 threat from a scheme. Remove 2 additional threat from that scheme for each [mental] you overpaid for this card (to a maximum of [mental][mental]).

flavor: “But I thought impressing girls was the whole point of being a super hero!”
name: ...stars And Garters"
text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove threat from a scheme equal to your THW. If you overpaid for this card with a [mental], confuse an enemy.

flavor: “In the end... force wins. Stabbing $&@# is what saves the world.”
name: Beast Mode
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 3 damage to an enemy. Deal 2 additional damage to that enemy for each [mental] you overpaid for this card (to a maximum of [mental][mental][mental]).

name: Self-Experimentation
text: Hero Interrupt: When you spend this card, take up to 3 damage → this card generates 1 additional [mental] for each damage taken this way.

flavor: "Shut up and kiss me, you big blue furry lug."
name: Trish Tilby
text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust this card → choose: • Tuck 1 event with a printed [mental] from your discard pile under Beast's Lab. • Draw 1 card.

name: Shi'ar Lab Module
text: Hero Resource: Exhaust this card → generate [mental] for an event. Hero Resource: Exhaust this card and discard a card tucked under Beast's Lab → generate [mental].

flavor: "Oh, my stars and garters... what have we here?"
name: Portable Analyzer
text: Resource: Generate [mental] to overpay for a card. (Limit once per card.)

name: Eidetic Memory
text: Response: After you change form, choose: • Tuck an event or resource card with a printed [mental] from your discard pile under Beast's Lab. • Add a card tucked under Beast's Lab to your hand.

name: Secondary Mutation
text: Forced Interrupt: When you would be defeated, instead set your hit point dial to 4 and change to alter-ego form. You may tuck events with a printed [mental] under Beast's Lab until there are 3 cards there. Remove this card from the game.
